settings.title: Settings
settings.providers_desc: Manage API keys & endpoints (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama…)
settings.api_models_desc: Add or discover models from a provider
settings.ghost_mode_desc: Don't save chats, pause memory, stay anonymous to the model
settings.voice_typing_desc: On-device speech-to-text. Enabling downloads a small (~40MB) offline recogniser that runs fully on-device — so voice typing works even on GrapheneOS with no Google services.
settings.delete_all_message: All saved conversations will be permanently deleted.
model.no_models_yet: No models yet — download one or add a provider.
chat.title: Rin
chat.ghost_banner: Ghost mode — this chat won't be saved
chat.delete_message: This conversation will be permanently deleted.
chat.no_tts: No text-to-speech engine installed. Add one (e.g. eSpeak from F-Droid) to hear replies.
chat.no_model_desc: Download a Gemma model, or pick a cloud model, to start chatting.
chat.model_load_failed_hint: It may be incompatible with this device.
chat.model_load_failed_suffix: Pick another model from the menu at the top, or add a cloud model in Settings.
tool.transcribe_desc: Record speech and Rin writes it down. Needs an audio-capable on-device model.
tool.needs_audio_model: Load a Gemma model with audio support to transcribe.
prompt.desc: Customize how Rin behaves. Saved for all chats.
provider.label: Provider
provider.desc: A provider is an account or endpoint — its base URL and API key. Add it once here, then point any number of models at it.
provider.none_yet: No providers yet. Add one to use OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama, OpenRouter, etc.
api.desc: Each provider's models load automatically — just flip on the ones you want.
api.no_providers: No providers yet — add one in Settings → Providers.
api.none_listed: This provider didn't list any models — add one by id below.
api.system_prompt_hint: Leave the system prompt blank to use the app's default prompt.
search.desc: When enabled, Rin searches the web before answering.
search.ollama_reusing: Reusing your saved Ollama provider key — no need to enter it again.
search.ollama_tip: Tip: add an Ollama provider under Providers and this fills in automatically.
assistant.no_model: No model is ready yet. Open Rin to download a model or pick a cloud model, then come back.
settings.spoken_replies_desc: On-device voices for reading replies aloud
voices.desc: Install a voice to have replies read aloud — fully on-device, even without Google services. Tap an installed voice to make it active.
voices.unsupported: On-device voices aren't supported on this device.
models.main_desc: On-device models, by type — and free up space
models.intro: These models run entirely on your device — no cloud, no account. Install what you need and delete anything to free up space.
models.speech_to_text_desc: Turns speech into text on-device — used by the mic when Voice typing is on. ~40 MB.
models.memory_embedder_desc: Finds relevant parts of your saved documents — used when Memory is on. ~55 MB.
models.purge_message: Every downloaded model — language models, voices, speech-to-text and the memory embedder — will be deleted to free space. You can re-download them later.
llm.desc: Download a Gemma model to chat fully on-device.
llm.import_hf_desc: Paste a direct link to a .litertlm model file on Hugging Face.
settings.defaults_desc: Pick the model for chat, voice, the popup and titles
defaults.titles_desc: After the first message, this model writes a short title. Cloud models run in parallel; an on-device model writes the title once the reply is done.
defaults.no_models: No models yet — add one in Models.
defaults.no_voices: Install a voice in Models → Voices.
